selection.selectedReason: Concept 03 best reads as a calm senior commander: sharp teal/gold silhouette, strong portrait potential, and enough shared amber/rift-energy language to belong with Glyph without looking like the same character.

concepts.label: Vulpine Officer
concepts.prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: commander concept reference for a mobile Three.js FPS cinematic
Primary request: Create an original humanoid animal-like commander who visually belongs beside Glyph, the warm amber gadget-runner hero, but reads older, steadier, and command-ready.
Subject: full-body isolated A-pose, vulpine officer silhouette, upright bipedal proportions, expressive brows, swept ears, short muzzle, gloved hands, compact tactical jacket, shoulder comms gear, light armor panels, no weapon.
Style/medium: polished stylized 3D game concept render, playful platformer-adventure energy, mobile-game readable silhouette.
Composition/framing: single character only, centered, full body visible, front-facing A-pose, generous padding, neutral studio background.
Color palette: teal command jacket, amber and cream fur, warm gold accents, dark gunmetal belt, small lime rift glow details.
Constraints: original character, no text, no letters, no logos, no watermark, no contact sheet, no extra poses, no prop gun.
concepts.selectionRationale: Not selected for the first cinematic because the silhouette, authority read, or visual distance from Glyph was weaker than concept 03.

finalPortrait.prompt:
Use case: precise-object-edit
Asset type: runtime commander portrait for a skippable first-level cinematic briefing in a mobile landscape Three.js FPS
Input image: the selected full-body A-pose commander concept is the identity reference; preserve the character's face, ears, muzzle, teal/gold command uniform, calm stern expression, and lime rift tech details.
Primary request: Create a close-up bust portrait of Commander Kade as a hologram comms feed for an in-game cinematic overlay.
Subject: the same original humanoid animal-like commander from the reference, shoulders and upper chest visible, facing camera with a confident urgent command expression.
Scene/backdrop: dark transparent-looking teal command-screen backdrop with subtle scanline glow and soft rift-green rim light, no hard text or symbols.
Style/medium: polished stylized 3D game portrait matching the reference, readable on a phone screen.
Composition/framing: centered bust portrait, head and shoulders large, no full body, no extra characters, enough padding around ears for UI cropping.
Lighting/mood: cool teal hologram glow with warm gold highlights; urgent but not scary.
Constraints: no text, no letters, no logos, no watermark, no weapon, preserve identity from reference image.

risks: The commander is currently a flat hologram portrait; a future 3D commander model should reuse this design but needs a separate rigging/performance pass.
Concepts intentionally use a neutral A-pose source style, while the runtime portrait is a tighter comms-feed crop for mobile readability.
